chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 21 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders as to maintainability of Main Petition. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on CMA No. 247/2026. 4. For orders on CMA No. 248/2026. 08.04.2026. Mr. Hassan Mandviwala, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions seeks withdrawal of the instant Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith all listed applications JUDGE AYAZ
